title: Predictive coding and test-time scaling
bridge_note: Layered inference under predictive coding maps cleanly to constrained update loops: observation ⊕ prediction ⊕ revision. Extra test-time steps improve identification where the update process stays structured enough to keep signal > noise.
cosine_bridge: Predict → compare → update repeats as a bounded alignment loop; additional inference steps help where constraints preserve usable signal (45° 📐 framing).
